title: Asana Project
description: A project represents a prioritized list of tasks in Asana or a board with columns of tasks represented as cards. It exists in a single workspace or organization.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

archived.description: True if the project is archived.

created_at.description: The time at which this resource was created.

modified_at.description: The time at which this project was last modified.

due_on.description: The day on which this project is due (YYYY-MM-DD).

start_on.description: The day on which work begins for this project (YYYY-MM-DD).

default_view.description: The default view of a project.

notes.description: Free-form textual information associated with the project.

html_notes.description: The notes of the project with formatting as HTML.

privacy_setting.description: The privacy setting of the project.

default_access_level.description: The default access for users or teams who join the project.

completed.description: True if the project is currently marked complete.

completed_at.description: The time at which this project was completed.

owner.description: The current owner of the project.

team.description: The team that this project is shared with.

workspace.description: The workspace or organization this project is associated with.

members.description: Array of users who are members of this project.

followers.description: Array of users following this project.

permalink_url.description: A URL that points directly to the object within Asana.
